rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Adding Case To December 20, 2001, Status Conference
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, PRE TRIAL MATTERS TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER BORICK.
MP-DEFT SB DECKING - O/C, DEFT DISMISSED. MP-DEFT INT'L TRUCK -

SUSTAIN demurrer as to lack of allegations re Fleur with leave to amend to clarify whether FLEUR claims any interest in the properties, what NATASHA did as FLEUR's agent, and what if anything FLEUR did as NATASHA's agent. OVERRULE demurrer to 1st cause of action for Quiet Title. Plaintiff may allege cause of action to set aside deed in SUSTAIN demurrer as to lack of allegations re Fleur with leave to amend to clarify whether FLEUR claims any interest in the properties, what NATASHA did as FLEUR's agent, and what if anything FLEUR did as NATASHA's agent. OVERRULE demurrer to 1st cause of action for Quiet Title. Plaintiff may allege cause of action to set aside deed in complaint to quiet title. SUSTAIN demurrer to 2nd cause of action Cancellation - Mistake with leave to amend to allege that P's mistake was caused by NATASHA & FLEUR, or that NATASHA & FLEUR had reason to know of the mistake; or that the result would be unconscionable. SUSTAIN demurrer to 3rd cause of action Cancellation - Incapacity with leave to amend to allege actual judicial determination of incapacity or appointment of conservator at time deeds were executed. Proceedings alone not sufficient. See O'Brien v. Dudenhoeffer (1993) 16 Cal.App.4th 327 SUSTAIN demurrer to 4th cause of action Cancellation - Undue Influence with leave to amend to allege there was a confidential relationship between Plaintiff and NATASHA & FLEUR; that Plaintiff acted in reliance upon the relationship with NATASHA & FLEUR in executing the deeds; and that NATASHA & FLEUR somehow exerted control over Plaintiff in getting the property deeded to them. See Civil ? 1575 and Goldman v. Goldman (1953) 116 Cal.App.2d 227 OVERRULE demurrer to 5th cause of action Imposition of a Constructive Trust in Real Property because Quiet Title is properly alleged. (CW)
DENY motion to strike. (CW)
